title: Vanilama's DeathCounter
body:
This Is a Lightweight Death Counter Datapack Which supports almost all versions.
to use it just put the datapack in your worlds datapacks folder and than type /reload in the chat if you get a chat message it works and it will count all deaths from every player from that day on. if you've ever made a server and wanted everyone to know how often they died than look no further this datapack/mod will make it so everyone knows how often they died
